name: Bay Networks, Inc.
description: Bay Networks, Inc. was a prominent computer networking equipment manufacturer formed in 1994 through the merger of SynOptics Communications and Wellfleet Communications. The company specialized in the design, manufacture, and marketing of internetworking products, including routers, hubs, and switches, which formed the backbone of enterprise local area networks (LANs) and wide area networks (WANs). Bay Networks was a major competitor to Cisco Systems before being acquired by Nortel Networks in 1998 for $9.1 billion.
